context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the PDP conversion funnel SQL with proper session deduplication, minimum views threshold, correct metric formulas, and low-conversion alerting thresholds per the product analytics skill.

checklist.name: Session deduplication in views CTE
checklist.description: The views CTE counts DISTINCT session_id per product_id (not COUNT(*) of raw events) — this addresses the multi-variant page view inflation issue

checklist.name: Three-CTE structure
checklist.description: Query uses three separate CTEs: one for views, one for add-to-cart sessions, and one for purchases — not a single monolithic join

checklist.name: Minimum views filter
checklist.description: A minimum pdp_views threshold of greater than 50 is applied to exclude low-traffic products from funnel results

checklist.name: Cancelled orders excluded
checklist.description: The purchases CTE or orders join filters out cancelled orders (e.g., status NOT IN ('cancelled') or equivalent)

checklist.name: pdp_to_atc_pct formula
checklist.description: pdp_to_atc_pct is computed as ROUND(100.0 * atc_sessions / NULLIF(pdp_views, 0), 1) — using NULLIF to guard against division by zero

checklist.name: pdp_conversion_pct formula
checklist.description: pdp_conversion_pct is computed separately as ROUND(100.0 * purchase_count / NULLIF(pdp_views, 0), 2) — a two-decimal metric distinct from ATC rate

checklist.name: COALESCE for missing products
checklist.description: COALESCE is used to handle products with no ATC events or no purchases (returning 0 rather than NULL for atc_sessions and purchase_count)

checklist.name: Low-conversion views threshold
checklist.description: The low-conversion alert query filters for products with more than 100 pdp_views (not just >50)

checklist.name: Low-conversion ATC threshold
checklist.description: The low-conversion alert query filters for products where pdp_to_atc_pct is below 2% (not a different threshold)

checklist.name: Investigation context in notes
checklist.description: analysis_notes.md mentions that low ATC rate can indicate pricing, description, or image quality issues (not just generic 'poor conversion')
